","type":"text/x-markdown"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/orga/README.md":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/orga/README.md","text":"# orga

> Organisational domain model built on the typed plugin

Provides type definitions for common organisational entities like projects, tasks, teams, persons, milestones, and roadmaps.

## Key features

* **Pre-built type definitions** -- project, task, team, person, workstream, assignment, roadmap, milestone, 1on1
* **Hierarchical node structure** -- parent relationships between organisational entities
* **Field definitions** -- common attributes like status, dates, stakeholders, participants
* **Enum definitions** -- predefined value sets (e.g., core-status)
* **Extensible** -- builds on the typed plugin's inheritance model

## Prerequisites

* typed plugin must be installed

## Quick start

Install plugin alongside typed. Use the Spawner to create new organisational entities. All types are immediately available in the type system.

## Plugin Library

Install from the [rimir plugin library](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-plugin-library/) via *Control Panel → Plugins → Get more plugins*.

## Demo

Try this plugin in the [live demo wiki](https://rimir-cc.github.io/tw-demo/).

## License

MIT -- see [LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md)

"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/architecture":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/architecture","created":"20260305110649878","modified":"20260305110649878","rdt.order":"2","rdt.plugin-key":"orga","rdt.plugin-name":"orga","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Organisational domain model built on the typed engine","rdt.section":"Architecture","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Type hierarchy

```
_node (abstract)
├── node
├── orga
│   ├── team
│   ├── person
│   │   └── assignment
│   └── project
│       ├── workstream
│       │   └── task
│       ├── roadmap
│       │   └── milestone
│       └── task
├── 1on1
└── (all types inherit _node common fields)
```

!! Inheritance model

* `_node` defines `rrt.fields:0()` — common fields shared by all types
* Subtypes add `rrt.fields:1()` for type-specific fields (e.g., task adds stakeholder, person adds birthday)
* Same pattern for enums: `_status` defines `rrt.options:0()`, `core-status` adds `rrt.options:1()`

!! Parent relationships

Enforced via type-specific field overrides:

|!Type |!Allowed parents |
|team, person, project |orga |
|workstream, task, roadmap |project |
|milestone |roadmap |
|assignment |person |
|1on1 |generic (any) |

!! Title generation

Computed via constraint filter:

```
[get[parent]] + [[/]] + [<type-tid>get[upref]] + [[:]] + [get[abbrev]] → join[]
```

Produces titles like `OrgaName/p:ProjectAbbrev`. The `node` type uses a simpler pattern: `parent/abbrev`.

!! File structure

```
orga/
  typed/
    types/       ← type definitions (_node.tid, orga.tid, project.tid, ...)
    fields/      ← field definitions (title.tid, parent.tid, status.tid, ...)
    enums/       ← enum definitions (_status.tid, core-status.tid)
  plugin.info
```

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="warning">
<$fill $name="body">Parent field overrides use the `validity` field to restrict which type references are allowed. Without a type-specific override, any typed tiddler can be a parent.</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/dev-workflow":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/dev-workflow","created":"20260305110649878","modified":"20260305110649878","rdt.order":"3","rdt.plugin-key":"orga","rdt.plugin-name":"orga","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Organisational domain model built on the typed engine","rdt.section":"Dev Workflow","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Plugin files

11 type definitions, 22+ field definitions, 2 enum definitions in `typed/` subdirectories, plus `plugin.info` and documentation tiddlers.

!! Restart rules

''Every change requires restart.'' Orga tiddlers are plugin shadow tiddlers loaded at boot. The filesystem-watcher cannot sync shadow tiddler changes.

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="danger">
<$fill $name="body">Every change to an orga `.tid` file requires a server restart — shadow tiddlers are loaded once at boot.</$fill>
</$transclude>

!! Adding a type

# Create `typed/types/<name>.tid`
# Set fields: `key`, `rrt.type: type`, `parent` (for inheritance), `icon`, `upref`, `caption`, `title`
# Optionally define `rrt.fields:1()` in body for extra fields
# Create field definitions for any new fields
# Create type-specific parent override if needed
# Restart server

!! Adding a field

# Create `typed/fields/<name>.tid`
# Set fields: `key`, `rrt.type: field`, `typed` (editor type), `caption`, `icon`, `title`
# Optional: `constraints` for validation rules
# Add field key to parent type's `rrt.fields:1()` function
# Restart server

!! Type-specific field override

# Create `typed/fields/<type>_<field>.tid` (e.g., `task_parent.tid`)
# Set same `key` as the base field
# Add `validity: <type-key>` to restrict to that type
# Set `typed` to allowed reference types
# Restart server

!! Adding an enum

# Create base: `typed/enums/<name>.tid` with `key`, `rrt.type: enum`, define `rrt.options:0()`
# Create child: set `parent` field, add `rrt.options:1()` for additional options
# Reference from a field with `typed: enum:<key>`
# Restart server

!! Dependencies

* Typed plugin (engine)
* Components plugin (`pills` facade for enum and object-ref field editors)

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="tip">
<$fill $name="body">The orga plugin depends on both the typed and components plugins. Make sure all three are registered in `tiddlywiki.info`.</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/examples":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/examples","created":"20260305110649879","modified":"20260305110649879","rdt.order":"4","rdt.plugin-key":"orga","rdt.plugin-name":"orga","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Organisational domain model built on the typed engine","rdt.section":"Examples","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Create an org → project → task hierarchy

# Open the Spawner and select type `orga`
# Set `abbrev: Acme`, `caption: Acme Corp` → title generates as `o:Acme`
# Create a project under it: type `project`, `parent: o:Acme`, `abbrev: Alpha` → title `o:Acme/p:Alpha`
# Create a task: type `task`, `parent: o:Acme/p:Alpha`, `abbrev: Fix` → title `o:Acme/p:Alpha/t:Fix`

!! Assign people to teams

# Create an org: `o:Acme`
# Create a team: type `team`, `parent: o:Acme`, `abbrev: Eng` → title `o:Acme/tm:Eng`
# Create a person: type `person`, `parent: o:Acme`, `abbrev: JD` → title `o:Acme/pe:JD`
# Create an assignment: type `assignment`, `parent: o:Acme/pe:JD`, `abbrev: EngLead` → title `o:Acme/pe:JD/a:EngLead`

The assignment links a person to a role. Use the `description` field to describe the assignment.

!! Parent constraints in action

When creating a `task`, the parent field only allows `project` references (via the type-specific override in `task_parent.tid`). Attempting to set a `person` or `team` as a task's parent will fail validation.

Similarly, `milestone` only allows `roadmap` parents, and `workstream` only allows `project` parents.

!! Title generation

Each type has an `upref` (short prefix) used in auto-generated titles:

|!Type |!Upref |!Example title |
|orga |`o` |`o:Acme` |
|project |`p` |`o:Acme/p:Alpha` |
|task |`t` |`o:Acme/p:Alpha/t:Fix` |
|team |`tm` |`o:Acme/tm:Eng` |
|person |`pe` |`o:Acme/pe:JD` |
|milestone |`ms` |`o:Acme/p:Alpha/rm:Q1/ms:Launch` |

The formula is: `parent / upref : abbrev`. This creates a hierarchical namespace.

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/faq":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/faq","created":"20260305110649879","modified":"20260305110649879","rdt.order":"5","rdt.plugin-key":"orga","rdt.plugin-name":"orga","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Organisational domain model built on the typed engine","rdt.section":"FAQ","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Q: Why does every change need a server restart?

Orga tiddlers are plugin shadow tiddlers loaded once at boot from `plugin.info`. The filesystem-watcher cannot sync shadow tiddler changes — they exist in the plugin bundle, not in the `tiddlers/` directory.

!! Q: How do I add a new organisational type?

# Create `typed/types/<name>.tid` in the orga plugin directory
# Set `key`, `rrt.type: type`, `parent` (typically `_node` or another type), `icon`, `upref`, `caption`
# Define `rrt.fields:1()` in the body for type-specific fields
# Create field definitions and parent overrides as needed
# Register any new enums
# Restart the server

!! Q: Can I have deeper than 3-level inheritance?

No. The typed engine's `:0`/`:1`/`:2` pattern is hardcoded due to TW issue #9647. In practice, the orga model uses 2 levels: `_node` provides `:0` (common fields), each concrete type provides `:1` (type-specific fields).

!! Q: How does title generation work for orga types?

Each type defines an `upref` field (e.g., `p` for project, `t` for task). The title filter combines: `parent + "/" + upref + ":" + abbrev`. So a project under "MyOrg" with abbreviation "Alpha" gets the title `MyOrg/p:Alpha`.

!! Q: What are type-specific field overrides?

A field can have multiple definitions with the same `key`. Adding a `validity` field restricts a definition to a specific type. For example, `task_parent.tid` has `key: parent` and `validity: task`, which restricts the parent field for tasks to only accept `project` references. Without the override, any typed tiddler could be a parent.

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/overview":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/overview","created":"20260305110649879","modified":"20260305110649879","rdt.hub-category":"ui-framework","rdt.hub-category-name":"UI Framework & Domain Model","rdt.hub-order":"3","rdt.order":"1","rdt.plugin-key":"orga","rdt.plugin-name":"orga","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Organisational domain model built on the typed engine","rdt.section":"Overview","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! What it does

Organisational domain model built on the typed engine. Defines types for organisations, projects, teams, people, and more. All types inherit from the abstract `_node` base type.

!! Types

|!Type |!Icon |!Key |!Extra fields |
|Organisation |🏢 |orga |— |
|Project |📦 |project |— |
|Task |🧮 |task |stakeholder |
|Team |🧑‍🤝‍🧑 |team |— |
|Person |🙍 |person |birthday |
|Node |📂 |node |— |
|Workstream |➿ |workstream |start-date, end-date |
|Assignment |🛃 |assignment |— |
|Roadmap |🔁 |roadmap |— |
|Milestone |🪧 |milestone |date |
|1on1 |🪧 |1on1 |participant |

!! Common fields (inherited from `_node`)

All types share: title, subtitle, abbrev, aliases, caption, description, parent, status

!! Enums

* ''core-status'' — active, locked, archived (inherits from `_status`)

!! Prerequisites

* Typed plugin installed and loaded
* TiddlyWiki running in Node.js server mode

!! Quick start

# Ensure the typed plugin is registered in `tiddlywiki.info`
# Register orga plugin in `tiddlywiki.info`
# Start server
# Use the Spawner to create organisational entities
# Field Bar appears automatically on all orga tiddlers

<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/callout" type="info">
<$fill $name="body">Orga is a domain plugin — it contributes types, fields, and enums to the typed engine. The typed plugin provides the UI (Spawner, Field Bar, Validator).</$fill>
</$transclude>

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/reference":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/reference","created":"20260305110649879","modified":"20260305110649879","rdt.order":"6","rdt.plugin-key":"orga","rdt.plugin-name":"orga","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Organisational domain model built on the typed engine","rdt.section":"Reference","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Type table

|!Key |!Icon |!Parent |!Upref |!Fields (rrt.fields:1) |
|`_node` |— |— |— |title parent caption description status abbrev |
|`node` |— |`_node` |— |node-title |
|`orga` |— |`_node` |`o` |— |
|`team` |— |`_node` |`tm` |— |
|`person` |— |`_node` |`pe` |birthday aliases |
|`project` |— |`_node` |`p` |start-date end-date |
|`workstream` |— |`project` |`ws` |— |
|`roadmap` |— |`project` |`rm` |— |
|`task` |— |`_node` |`t` |stakeholder |
|`milestone` |— |`roadmap` |`ms` |date |
|`assignment` |— |`person` |`a` |— |
|`1on1` |— |`_node` |`1` |participant |

!! Field table

|!Key |!Typed |!Constraints |!Description |
|`title` |`$title` |`filter` |Auto-generated title |
|`parent` |varies by type |`!1+` |Parent reference |
|`caption` |`text` |— |Display name |
|`description` |`text` |— |Long description |
|`status` |`enum:_status` |— |Status enum |
|`abbrev` |`text` |`!u` |Unique abbreviation |
|`start-date` |`date` |— |Start date |
|`end-date` |`date` |— |End date |
|`date` |`date` |— |Date (milestones) |
|`birthday` |`date` |— |Birthday (persons) |
|`aliases` |`text` |— |Alternative names |
|`stakeholder` |`person` |— |Stakeholder reference |
|`participant` |`person` |`!1+` |1on1 participant |
|`subtitle` |`text` |— |Subtitle text |
|`node-title` |`text` |— |Node display title |

!! Parent constraint overrides

|!Type |!Allowed parent types |
|`team` |`orga` |
|`person` |`orga` |
|`project` |`orga` |
|`workstream` |`project` |
|`task` |`project` |
|`roadmap` |`project` |
|`milestone` |`roadmap` |
|`assignment` |`person` |

!! Enum: _status / core-status

Base options (`rrt.options:0`): `active` `inactive` `archived`

Extended options (`rrt.options:1` via `core-status`): `planned` `in-progress` `completed` `on-hold` `cancelled`

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/tw-internals":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/doc/tw-internals","created":"20260305110649880","modified":"20260305110649880","rdt.order":"7","rdt.plugin-key":"orga","rdt.plugin-name":"orga","rdt.plugin-subtitle":"Organisational domain model built on the typed engine","rdt.section":"TW Internals","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<$transclude $tiddler="$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template/templates/page">
<$fill $name="body">

!! Shadow tiddler loading

Orga tiddlers are shadow tiddlers — they live inside the plugin bundle defined by `plugin.info`. TW loads all shadow tiddlers at boot from the plugin's directory tree. They are read-only in normal operation; editing a shadow tiddler in the browser creates a regular tiddler that overrides it.

!! $importvariables for dynamic type import

The Spawner and Field Bar use `$importvariables` to pull type and field definitions into scope at runtime:

```
<$importvariables filter="[[$:/plugins/rimir/typed/functions]] [<typeTiddler>] [<parentTypeTiddler>]">
```

This brings `rrt.fields()`, `rrt.fields:0()`, `rrt.fields:1()`, etc. into scope for the current type. It's the only way to import from a computed tiddler title (where the title depends on user selection).

!! plugin.info loading

TW reads `plugin.info` to discover the plugin's metadata and then scans the plugin directory for tiddler files. Each `.tid` file becomes a shadow tiddler under the plugin's namespace. The directory structure is flattened — subdirectory paths don't affect tiddler titles (titles come from the `title` field in the file).

!! Field discovery via all[shadows+tiddlers]

The type system discovers all type/field/enum definitions using:

```
[all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type[type]]
```

This searches both shadow tiddlers (from plugins) and regular tiddlers. This is why orga types are discoverable without any central registry — the `rrt.type` field serves as a self-registration mechanism.

!! Plugin dependencies

The orga plugin depends on the typed and components plugins. TW loads plugins in dependency order based on `plugin.info`. If typed or components is missing, the orga plugin's type definitions will load but the Spawner, Field Bar, and Validator UIs won't function.

</$fill>
</$transclude>
"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/documentation":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/documentation","created":"20260305110649880","modified":"20260305110649880","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<%if [[$:/plugins/rimir/doc-template]has[plugin-type]] %>

Organisational domain model built on the typed plugin. Provides type definitions for common organisational entities like projects, tasks, teams, persons, milestones, and roadmaps.

!! Key features

* ''Pre-built type definitions'' — project, task, team, person, workstream, assignment, roadmap, milestone, 1on1
* ''Hierarchical node structure'' — parent relationships between organisational entities
* ''Field definitions'' — common attributes like status, dates, stakeholders, participants

* ''Extensible'' — builds on the typed plugin's inheritance model

!! Prerequisites

Install plugin alongside typed. Use the Spawner to create new organisational entities. All types are immediately available in the type system.

"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/test/test-schema":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/test/test-schema","description":"Verify orga schema tiddlers have correct rrt.type fields","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki-multiple","tags":"[[$:/tags/wiki-test-spec]]","text":"title: $:/plugins/rimir/orga/typed/types/testtype
rrt.type: type
key: testtype
caption: Test Type
type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki

\function rrt.fields:1() testfield
+
title: $:/plugins/rimir/orga/typed/fields/testfield
rrt.type: field
key: testfield
caption: Test Field
constraints: !2+ n:1
typed: text
type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki

A test field
+
title: $:/plugins/rimir/orga/typed/enums/testenum
rrt.type: enum
key: testenum
caption: Test Enum
type: text/vnd.tiddlywiki

A test enum
+
title: Output

\whitespace trim
\function _locate_rrt(type) [all[shadows+tiddlers]rrt.type<type>]

types:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate_rrt],[type]count[]] }}}/>,fields:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate_rrt],[field]count[]] }}}/>,enums:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate_rrt],[enum]count[]] }}}/>,typekey:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate_rrt],[type]key[testtype]] }}}/>,fieldkey:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate_rrt],[field]key[testfield]] }}}/>,fieldtyped:<$text text={{{ [function[_locate_rrt],[field]key[testfield]get[typed]] }}}/>
+
title: ExpectedResult

<p>types:1,fields:1,enums:1,typekey:$:/plugins/rimir/orga/typed/types/testtype,fieldkey:$:/plugins/rimir/orga/typed/fields/testfield,fieldtyped:text</p>
+
title: Narrative

Verifies orga schema tiddlers are discoverable by rrt.type field and have expected key and typed attributes.
"},"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/orga/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info":{"title":"/home/runner/work/tw-plugin-library/tw-plugin-library/wiki/plugins/rimir/orga/test-edition/tiddlywiki.info","text":"{

","type":".info"},"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/typed/enums/_status":{"title":"$:/plugins/rimir/orga/typed/enums/_status","caption":"_Status","created":"20260210114801046","icon":"","key":"_status","modified":"20260305110649881","options":"","rrt.type":"enum","tags":"","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\function rrt.options:0() active locked archived
